title: "Underflow of indentation" when processing simple SystemVerilog file
body:
While processing SystemVerilog sources (using verilator source_file.sv --binary) an error encounters:
`%Error: Internal Error: ../V3File.h:163: Underflow of indentation`

Verilator version:
`Verilator 5.041 devel rev v5.040-271-g49c51af84`

Temporary workaround - edited V3File.h:
```
    void indentDec() {
        if (m_blockIndent > m_indentLevel)
            m_indentLevel = 0;
        else
            m_indentLevel -= m_blockIndent;
        UASSERT(m_indentLevel >= 0, "Underflow of indentation");
    }
```


Debug output:


void indentDec() {
        if (m_blockIndent > m_indentLevel)
            m_indentLevel = 0;
        else

        UASSERT(m_indentLevel >= 0, "Underflow of indentation");
